auth.legacyImportNotice: Coming from the old site? Your account has been imported. Use "Forgot password" with your username or email to set a new password.

auth.newPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

home.title: Your tribune, your team,
home.subtitle: Sports, more sports, and everything in between...
home.noTribunes: No tribunes available at the moment.
home.noTribunesYet: You haven't joined any tribune yet.

tribune.dictationError: Voice dictation couldn't start. Check microphone access.
tribune.dictationDenied: Microphone access denied. Check in order: 1) lock icon left of the address bar → "Microphone" → Allow, then reload the page; 2) chrome://settings/content/microphone → remove fanstribune.com from the Blocked list if present, then reload; 3) Windows: Settings → Privacy → Microphone → enable "Let desktop apps access your microphone". If none of this helps, open the console (F12) and send me the [voice-dictation] line.
tribune.dictationNoDevice: No microphone detected. Plug one in or check your system audio devices.
tribune.dictationDeviceBusy: Microphone is in use by another app. Close it (Zoom, Meet, OBS…) and try again.
tribune.dictationInsecure: Voice dictation requires a secure HTTPS connection.
tribune.dictationServiceUnavailable: Google's voice recognition service is unreachable. Check your internet connection or try again in a few minutes.
tribune.noContent: No content yet. Be the first to write!
tribune.muted: You are muted in this tribune
tribune.editSave: Enter to save · Escape to cancel

community.joinSubtitle: Hockey, Baseball, Football and much more
community.available: {count, plural, =1 {1 tribune available} other {# tribunes available}}

community.joinToAccess: Join this tribune to access the content.
community.noContentYet: No content published in this tribune yet.
community.joinDiscussionBody: This tribune's chat is reserved for members. Sign up or log in to join the real-time conversation with other fans.
community.allJoinedMessage: You've already joined all tribunes in this category.

pool.title: NHL Pool
pool.tagline: Build a salary-cap roster and climb the standings.

beta.message: The pool is under construction. You can already explore and build your team to try it out, but it's for testing only: all teams will be reset before the official season launch.

home.heroDesc: Build a roster of {f} forwards, {d} defensemen{g, plural, =0 {} other {, # goalies}}{teams, plural, =0 {} one { and # NHL team} other { and # NHL teams}} under a {budget}M cap, and rack up points from real NHL performances.
home.loginRequired: Sign in to build your team.
home.step1Desc: Pick {f} forwards, {d} defensemen{g, plural, =0 {} other {, # goalies}}{teams, plural, =0 {} one { and # NHL team} other { and # NHL teams}} without exceeding the {budget}M cap.
home.step2DescDate: Adjust your lineup freely until the draft deadline (on {date}).
home.step2Desc: Adjust your lineup freely until the draft deadline.
home.step3Desc: Every night, your players earn points from their real NHL games.
home.step4Desc: Track your spot and beat the other members all season long.
home.txNote: You'll be able to make up to {count, plural, one {# trade} other {# trades}} during the season.
home.starsNote: ★ Star players: your star forward and star defenseman earn double points.
home.noTeamsYet: No teams entered yet — be the first to build yours.
home.poolOpensSoon: The pool opens soon. Come back to sign up.

standingsPage.title: Standings — {season}
standingsPage.empty: No teams in the standings yet.

teamPage.noRoster: This team doesn't have a lineup yet.

playerPage.metaDesc: Pool stats and value for {name} in the {brand} NHL Pool.
playerPage.noStats: No stats yet — the season hasn't started.

composer.draftClosed: 🔒 The draft is closed — your lineup is locked.
composer.intro: Pick your players section by section, then Confirm your full lineup to activate your team.
composer.confirmedToast: Lineup confirmed — your team is active!
composer.lastSeasonHint: Last season's pool points (used to set the placeholder price)
composer.starsRequired: Choose your star forward and star defenseman to save.
composer.starsRequiredTrade: You must pick a new star for the position your trade freed.
composer.starsHint: Designate a star forward and a star defenseman — their points count double. Once the season starts they're locked (unless you trade a star).

myTeamPage.seasonNotStarted: The season hasn't started — your points will add up after each game.
